content:
IVX GLOBAL INTENT ENGINE — FINAL BUSINESS PROOF

Do not tell me what was coded.

Prove the complete production workflow.

For one REAL visitor show:

1. Google search query
2. Landing page opened
3. Visitor country
4. Visitor language
5. Device
6. Time
7. AI conversation started
8. Registration created
9. Member created
10. Investor created (if applicable)
11. CRM updated
12. Analytics updated
13. Autonomous follow-up scheduled
14. Email/SMS sequence created
15. Dashboard updated

Return:

GitHub SHA
Render Deploy ID
Supabase Record IDs
HTTP responses
Screenshots
Production timestamps

If any step cannot be proven, mark it UNVERIFIED.
Do not mark COMPLETE without proof.
